title: the Post Office (Monthly Income Account) Amendment Rules, 2000.
description: the Post Office (Monthly Income Account) Amendment Rules, 2000.
text: REGD. NO D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 71] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 1,2000/MAGHA 12,1921 294 GI/2000 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st February, 2000 G. S. R. 80(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 15 of the Government Savings Bank Act, 1873 (5 of 1873), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Post Office (Monthly Income Account) Rules, 1987, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Post Office (Monthly Income Account) Amendment Rules, 2000. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Post Office (Monthly Income Account) Rules, 1987, (i) for rule 4, the following rule shall be substituted, namely:- "4. Opening of accounts - A depositor may operate more than one account under these rules subject to the condition that deposits in all accounts taken together shall not exceed rupees three lakhs in case of single account and rupees six lakhs in case of joint account."; (ii) in rule 5, for sub-rule (1), the following sub-rule shall be substituted, namely:- "(1) There shall be only one deposit in the account of six thousand rupees or multiple thereof not exceeding rupees three lakhs in case of single account and rupees six lakhs in case of joint account." [F. No. 18/8/98-NS-II] S. D. PAUL, Under Secy. Foot note:—rhe Principal rules were published vide notification GSR 701 (E) dated 10.08.1987 and amended vide GSR 805 (E) dated 21.07.1988, GSR 46 (E) dated 20.01.1989, GSR 581 (E) dated 12.09.1991, GSR 430 (E) dated 24.04.1992, GSR 390 (E) dated 29.04.1993, GSR 585 (E) dated 02.09.1993, GSR 5 (E) dated 01.01.1999 and GSR 45 (E) dated 15.01.2000. Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
